<p>The region <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="R" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>R</mi>
</math></span> is bounded by the curves <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="y = f\left( x \right)" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">

<mi>y</mi>

<mi>x</mi>

<mi>y</mi>
<mo>=</mo>
<mn>9</mn>
</math></span> as shown on the following diagram.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">The shape of a clay vase can be modelled by rotating the region <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="R" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>R</mi>
</math></span> through 360˚ about the <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="y" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>y</mi>
</math></span>-axis.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">Find the volume of clay used to make the vase.</p>
